scenarios.description: load() with no env entries and systemProperties disabled exercises empty list loop (loop-0, branch-true)
scenarios.precondition: Ensure directoryPath contains a valid .env file that parses to an empty List<DotenvEntry>; using real DotenvParser and DotenvReader
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv instance whose entries() is empty and no System properties set

scenarios.description: load() with one env entry and systemProperties disabled exercises single-element loop (loop-1, branch-true)
scenarios.precondition: Directory contains .env with one valid KEY=VALUE line
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv where entries() contains exactly one entry {KEY=VALUE} and no System property for KEY

scenarios.description: load() with multiple env entries and systemProperties disabled exercises multi-element loop (loop-N, branch-true)
scenarios.precondition: Directory contains .env with multiple valid KEYn=VALUEn lines
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv where entries() contains all file entries and no System properties set

scenarios.description: load() with no env entries and systemProperties enabled skips loop (loop-0, branch-false)
scenarios.precondition: Ensure directoryPath contains a valid .env file that parses to an empty list; call systemProperties()
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv instance whose entries() is empty and no new System property set

scenarios.description: load() with multiple env entries and systemProperties enabled skips loop but uses system env override (branch-false, loop skipped)
scenarios.precondition: Directory contains .env with multiple KEY=VALUE; set one matching KEY in System.getenv; call systemProperties()
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv where get(KEY) returns System.getenv KEY and entries() unmodified from file+system
pseudocode: set env KEYx to SYSVAL; DotenvBuilder b = Dotenv.configure().directory(multiEntryEnvDir).systemProperties();

scenarios.description: load() with missing .env and default throwIfMissing=true throws DotenvException (exception)
scenarios.precondition: DirectoryPath points to non-existent directory; default throwIfMissing
scenarios.expectedResult: throws DotenvException; no System properties modified

scenarios.description: load() with malformed .env and default throwIfMalformed=true throws DotenvException (exception)
scenarios.precondition: Directory contains .env with invalid format (no '='), default throwIfMalformed
scenarios.expectedResult: throws DotenvException; no System properties modified
